phrases.text_local: Onde fica a torre de sinal?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DIH see-NAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Fortifications in Portugal typically feature prominent watchtowers for maritime observation.

likely_response.local: A Torre do Sinal está no Pátio Central. Siga as placas para a Torre do Sinal.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH TAW-rih DOO see-NAHL ehs-TAH NOO PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO see-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: The Signal Tower is in the Central Courtyard. Follow the signs to the Signal Tower.

responses.english: The Signal Tower is in the Central Courtyard. Follow the signs to the Signal Tower.
responses.phonetic: AH TAW-rih DOO see-NAHL ehs-TAH NOO PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO see-NAHL.
responses.local: A Torre do Sinal está no Pátio Central. Siga as placas para a Torre do Sinal.

phrases.text_local: Onde é que fica a sala de exposições?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH KIH FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Temporary exhibits are often positioned near entry points for visitor convenience.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou ao guia local.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW OW GEEUH loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket office or the local guide.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket office or the local guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW OW GEEUH loo-KAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou ao guia local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the exhibition room is

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Visitors often ask for specific historical rooms; staff provide direct spatial cues.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala de Exposições.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Exhibition Room.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Exhibition Room.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Sala de Exposições.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala de Exposições?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: The exhibition room is a key attraction inside the fort.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao Pátio Central da fortaleza e siga as indicações para a Sala de Exposições.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL DUH foo-ruh-tuh-LEH-zuh EH SEE-guh UHSH een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the Central Courtyard of the fortress and follow the signs to the Exhibition Room.

responses.english: Go to the Central Courtyard of the fortress and follow the signs to the Exhibition Room.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL DUH foo-ruh-tuh-LEH-zuh EH SEE-guh UHSH een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH ehsh-poo-zee-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Dirija-se ao Pátio Central da fortaleza e siga as indicações para a Sala de Exposições.

phrases.cultural_note: Original defensive structures are preserved as key historical landmarks within the site.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Muralhas Originais.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh aw-ree-zhee-NEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the Original Walls.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Bateria de Canhões?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH buh-tih-REEUH DIH kahn-NYOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Artillery placements historically defended coastal access points in Algarve fortresses.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Bateria de Canhões.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH buh-tih-REEUH DIH kahn-NYOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Cannon Battery.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Torre do Sinal?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DOO see-NAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The signal tower was historically used for maritime communication.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, a Torre do Sinal localiza-se na fortaleza.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH TAW-rih DOO see-NAHL loo-kuh-LEE-zuh-SIH NUH foo-ruh-tuh-LEH-zuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the signal tower is located in the fortress.

responses.english: Good morning, the signal tower is located in the fortress.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH TAW-rih DOO see-NAHL loo-kuh-LEE-zuh-SIH NUH foo-ruh-tuh-LEH-zuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, a Torre do Sinal localiza-se na fortaleza.

phrases.text_local: Onde está o Pátio Central da fortaleza?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW PAHT-yoo sayngt-RAHL DUH foo-ruh-tuh-LEH-zuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Courtyards served as operational hubs and gathering spaces in Portuguese military architecture.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no centro do complexo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO SAYNGT-roo DOO koomp-LEHK-soo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the center of the complex.

responses.english: Good morning, in the center of the complex.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO SAYNGT-roo DOO koomp-LEHK-soo.
responses.local: Bom dia, no centro do complexo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cannon battery is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde fica a Bateria de Canhões?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH buh-tih-REEUH DIH kahn-NYOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Cannon batteries are common in historical fortresses; visitors often ask for them first.

likely_response.translation_en: In the central courtyard, on the left.

responses.english: In the central courtyard, on the left.
